message:
fix: Remove redundant hooks reference from plugin manifest

The hooks/hooks.json file is loaded automatically by Claude Code,
so it should not be explicitly referenced in the manifest.hooks field.
This field should only contain additional hook files beyond the standard one.

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,5 @@
   },
   "homepage": "https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code",
   "license": "MIT",
-  "keywords": ["hooks", "automation", "workflow", "continuation"],
-  "hooks": "./hooks/hooks.json"
+  "keywords": ["hooks", "automation", "workflow", "continuation"]
 }
\ No newline at end of file
